steps.title: Use the two points
steps.content: The two function values give the points $(0,0)$ and $(11,5)$. Since the function is linear, these two points determine the equation.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Compute the slope between the two points.
$$m=\frac{5-0}{11-0}=\frac{5}{11}$$
Because the line passes through $(0,0)$, the intercept is $0$, so
$$h(x)=\frac{5}{11}x$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
The plotted points lie on the line with slope $\frac{5}{11}$ and intercept $0$. A direct check gives
$$h(11)=\frac{5}{11}(11)=5$$
The answer is A.
